name: Puspetindo ERP System
description: A full-stack ERP system for Puspetindo covering sales, procurement, inventory, finance modules, and more. Built with Laravel, React, TypeScript, and Inertia.js.

name: CSIRT Ticketing System
description: A streamlined ticketing system developed for BangkalanKab-CSIRT to enhance issue reporting and resolution. Built with Laravel, React, Inertia.js, and MySQL.

name: CSIRT Web Profile
description: An official web profile for BangkalanKab-CSIRT showcasing its mission, services, and achievements in cybersecurity. Built with Laravel and MySQL.

name: Pen & Paper
description: A web-based social media platform for sharing and engaging through written content, connecting people through creative expression. Built with React, Hapi.js, MySQL, and Sequelize.

name: Point of Sale (POS) System
description: A Point of Sale system designed for Omah Jawa restaurant to handle order management, sales tracking, and customer service efficiently. Built with Laravel and MySQL.

name: Snake Game
description: A classic Snake game where the player controls a growing snake and avoids colliding with its own body. Built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML Canvas.
